subject: WarpTools support for EER files?
body:
Hello Warp Team,

I was wondering how I can utilize WarpTools to process EER data files for a 
tomography dataset. 

I am trying to follow the tutorial on the github page for processing frame 
stacks, but I'm not sure where I would implement the EER flag/info that is 
suggested in the directions for Warp (not WarpTools) 
at http://www.warpem.com/warp/?page_id=1606

Can you please provide some guidance? I am very excited to use the Warp/M 
pipeline for this project!

Thank you,
Valerie
